name: Fresh Fruit Parfait
recipeIngredient: 1 package JELL-O Brand Gelatin, any flavor
recipeInstructions:
1. Divide sliced bananas and strawberries into 6 dessert glasses.
2. Prepare JELL-O according to the package instructions.
3. Pour the gelatin evenly over the fruit in each glass.
4. Refrigerate for 4 hours or until firm.
5. Before serving, top each dessert with 1 tablespoon of thawed COOL WHIP.
